instruction: Help me record the monthly revenue

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Month'
ws['B1'] = 'Revenue(10K CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'January'
ws['B2'] = 45.2
ws['A3'] = 'February'
ws['B3'] = 38.7
ws['A4'] = 'March'
ws['B4'] = 52.1
ws['A5'] = 'April'
ws['B5'] = 49.8
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/monthly_revenue.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the monthly revenue
Find the month with the highest revenue from /home/user/Desktop/monthly_revenue.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/revenue_report.txt: 'Highest Revenue Month: March (52.1)', save
